records.description: UnsupportedClassVersionError — upgrade JDK to match compiled class version

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "java.lang.UnsupportedClassVersionError: com/myapp/Main has been compiled by a more recent version of the Java Runtime (class file version 65.0), this version only recognizes up to 61.0" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: source release \d+ requires target release \d+|release version \d+ not supported
records.description: Source/target version mismatch — set JAVA_HOME to JDK matching project target version

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error: release version 21 not supported" >&2; exit 1'
